name: Cursor LLM Council — PR Review
description: Comment /council on a PR to get a multi-model merge ruling.

prompts.prompt: Cursor LLM Council PR review. If comment contains /council, convene engineering preset council on "Should we merge this PR?" with PR context. Follow cursor-llm-council skill: Task subagents → ballots → chair ruling. Post concise PR comment with <details> for full transcript.
